caption: In a large, indoor hall with a blue carpet and a high ceiling featuring ornate chandeliers and recessed lighting, several people are performing synchronized movements. In the center, a man wearing a blue traditional tunic and trousers leads the group, transitioning from a standing posture with his arms folded to a dynamic stance with one arm raised and the other bent. Surrounding him are other practitioners, including two people in white traditional attire and one in black, who follow his lead. An audience is seated in the background, though they remain mostly out of focus. As the sequence progresses, the performers shift their weight and move their arms in coordination, demonstrating a martial arts or traditional dance routine. The setting remains constant throughout the frames, while the physical positions of the practitioners evolve as they execute their choreographed sequence.
